sections.paragraph:
Original: משׂרקה

Transliteration: maśrêqâh

Phonetic: mas-ray-kaw'

BDB Definition:

Masrekah = "vineyard of noble vines"
  1. an ancient place, the native spot of Samlah, one of the old kings of the Edomites

Origin: a form for H7796 used denominatively

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
